nasb.text: You shall present a burnt offering to the Lord  as a soothing aroma: one bull, one ram, seven male lambs one year old, having them without defect;

esv.text: but you shall offer a burnt offering to the Lord, a pleasing aroma: one bull from the herd, one ram, seven male lambs a year old: see that they are without blemish.

cnv.text: 只要把燔祭作馨香的祭獻給耶和華，就是一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、七隻一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔。

ccb.text: 你们要给耶和华献上馨香的燔祭，即毫无残疾的公牛犊一头、公绵羊一只和一岁的公羊羔七只；
